name: I got exposed to chemicals at work and I'm feeling sick now—what do I do first without getting fired?
description: Seek medical care immediately and notify your employer in writing about the exposure. Document the specific chemicals involved by requesting Safety Data Sheets

mainEntity.name: I got exposed to chemicals at work and I'm feeling sick now—what do I do first without getting fired?

acceptedAnswer.text: Seek medical care immediately and notify your employer in writing about the exposure. Document the specific chemicals involved by requesting Safety Data Sheets (SDS) and keep a record of your symptoms to ensure your claim is protected under Utah's reporting deadlines.
